functions.description: The Ask Coach title bar: a small Buddy avatar beside the screen name and an honest 'mock coach' subtitle.
functions.name: AskCoachHeader

functions.description: The Ask Coach chat screen. Pure composition over AskCoachHeader, the ChatThread (or AskCoachEmptyState), and AskCoachInputBar. Owns the conversation state and the send/seed behavior: on send it appends the user's question and Buddy's CoachEngine reply; on appear it replays a seeded rbAskSeedQuestion so a scenario renders a real exchange.
functions.name: AskCoachView

functions.description: Pure deterministic generator that turns the weeks WeeklyLoad context into a five-section weekly recap — what went well, what changed, training risk, suggested next week, and one focus area — plus a Buddy mood and a safety flag, classifying the week as empty, spiking, sparse, or solid. Mirrors CoachEngine; honors the conservative, never-shame-based, injury-aware coaching rules.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewEngine

functions.description: The recap's closing one-focus-area callout — a single prominent next-action on the brand/gold gradient.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewFocusCallout

functions.description: The Weekly Review title bar: Buddy avatar, screen name with a generated-recap subtitle, and a Done button that dismisses the recap.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewHeader

functions.description: The recap hero: Buddy at the review mood, a mood chip, and the headline that sets the week's tone.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewHero

functions.description: The training-risk section, taking the amber shield-marked safety treatment when the week's load warrants caution and a calm green treatment when risk is low.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewRiskSection

functions.description: One labeled prose section in the Weekly Review — a tinted icon, an uppercase title, and the recap copy on a standard card. Reused across the recap's standard sections.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewSection

functions.description: The read-only Weekly Review screen: composes the header, hero, the four prose sections, the training-risk section, and the focus-area callout over a WeeklyReview value, branching between the activity recap and the empty first-week prompt.
functions.name: WeeklyReviewView

userPrompt:
mode: ui

## Goal

A weekly recap surface the AI coach generates from the same `TodayState` /
`WeeklyLoad` context: **what went well, what changed, training risk, suggested
next week, and one focus area.** Read-only, encouraging, never shame-based —
consistent with the coach's safety rules.

## What exists today

- `WeeklyLoad` domain type (`Sources/AppCore/Model.swift`) — weeklyMileage,
  daysRunThisWeek, longestRunMiles, restDaysThisWeek, loadTrend.
- `WeeklyLoadCard` (`Sources/AppCore/WeeklyLoadCard.swift`) — the compact Today
  snapshot of the same data.
- `CoachRecommendation` + curated/mock coach logic (added with Ask Coach).

## What to build

- A `WeeklyReview` value type (sections above) derived from `WeeklyLoad` +
  recent workouts via a deterministic, testable summarizer (pure function over
  context → curated/templated prose, same mock approach as the coach).
- A `WeeklyReviewCard` / screen presenting the five sections with a Buddy mood
  and a clear "one focus area" callout.
- Entry point reached from the Coach tab (added with Ask Coach).

## Scenarios (data states)

- **Solid week** — consistent runs, building load, positive recap.
- **Spiking load** — 40% week-over-week jump → risk callout + easy-week focus.
- **Sparse / mostly rest** — few sessions, gentle "ease back in" framing.
- **Empty** — no activity history yet → encouraging first-week prompt.

## Out of scope

- Real LLM generation, charts/graphs, Strava effort trends, notifications.
